positive: A minimalist geometric illustration featuring stylized mountain ranges and abstract constellations, rendered in deep navy blue, burnt orange, and cream. The composition is circular, highly symmetrical, and centered, forming a cohesive emblem suitable for apparel printing. Elements should utilize clean silhouettes, strong negative space, and bold lines, mimicking a stylized, vintage celestial map meets mid-century modern design. Studio lighting, vector art quality, high contrast, suitable for screen printing.
